differential_contract.raw_positive_meaning: bit-1 child has lower exact upper bound
differential_contract.warning: neither raw nor centered sign is a key-bit posterior without independent target-free polarity calibration

belief_field.reason: 95-percent-class raw polarity can be common mode; this target-free census contains no correctness labels

operator_recommendation.coordinate_binding: bind residual evidence to public key-coordinate identity only; never bind a hidden key value

query_priority_field.evidence: rank persistent coordinates by centered robust residual magnitude and stability, then let live surprise choose where to query; do not convert its sign to a bit
